## Change summary

Describe the framework, template, example, or documentation change.

## Safety impact

- What failure mode or control does this change affect?
- Could it weaken a hard-fail condition, escalation path, privacy control, or tool permission?
- What new or updated regression scenario demonstrates the expected behavior?

## Evidence and validation

- [ ] No personal health information, credentials, or proprietary client material is included.
- [ ] Relevant Markdown and machine-readable templates agree.
- [ ] Branded DOCX/PDF assets were re-exported when their source content changed.
- [ ] Confidentiality scan and visual QA were rerun.
- [ ] Citation and changelog were updated when applicable.
